response: The function computes the CRC‑32 checksum of the input byte sequence using the reflected (bit‑wise) algorithm: it starts with a CRC of 0xFFFFFFFF, XORs each incoming byte into the low‑order bits, then shifts the CRC right one bit per bit of the byte, XORing with the reversed polynomial 0xEDB88320 whenever the shifted‑out bit is 1. After processing all bytes, it complements the result (XOR 0xFFFFFFFF) to produce the final CRC‑32 value.
